creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
Created attachment 254209
Update Ardour to 8.9.0 release.

This is the second hot-fix minor release, I skipped Ardour 8.7.0 and 8.8.0 since they were causing crashes. See the announcement on their website.

Briefly tested on 14.1-RELEASE amd64, no regressions so far - let's hope third time's the charm. Apply patch with `git am`.
